transcript.text:
[Tzuyang in Yokji Island]
Hello everyone
I'll be going to the fish-net market today
I'm going to fill this box with lots of fish!
I'm taking that boat right there
This box is too small Can I even fit 30?
What kind of fish is available?
Mackerel
There's a lot in here That's so many!
We have about 40,000 mackerels..
Take all of them
Can I eat all of them?
Red Snapper
They're still babies
[Time to eat!]
It's a guaranteed catch if I fish here

[Rock Cod]
For fish like Japanese Horse Mackerels
We keep them here temporarily to sell (We do not raise them in the nets)
Sashimi is great You can braise it too
Or just cook it on a pan
That's a big one!
[Just need to lift it up]
[Half of them got away]
Can I eat all of this?
Please don't escape!
Japanese horse mackerel
You see the ones that are slightly bigger? We call them "ahji"
Does it taste different?
The bigger the fish, The more fish oil it has
Sounds delicious
[Excited]

What is that? It looks like a rock cod
[I'll catch a sea bass for you]
[One more time]
[You can't get me!]
[New target]
[Oh no, it's Tzuyang!]
The fish is too big, that's why
The fishing net is too small
[Red Snapper instead]
I kind of want that sea bass
You can't even eat it all
If you can eat that whole fish, then...
I can eat it all
Eat a lot
Thank you
Come again

[Let's go eat]
Is that a real bird?
[Or are they sculptures?]
[Who is that!?]
[Here to fillet]
Red Snapper? Japanese Horse Mackerels too
Fillet, please
[Let's organize the fish]
This one is big!
It's not that different in size compared with the Red Snapper
How much are you selling the Ahji for?
[They think she's here to sell her fish]
These are for me to eat
What is your name?
Broadcast name? It's Tzuyang!
She's from YouTube

[Wow, it's Tzuyang!]
I'm taking a photo of you!
[Tzuyang's fan service]
[I will not lose a second of this moment]
[Let's go~]
You'll need about 6 people to fish a Red Snapper this big
[Thinking about the Sea Bass she couldn't get]
This is just 1 chunk of meat from the fish How is she going to eat everything?
[Red Snapper]
[Japanese Horse Mackerel]
[Getting ready to eat]
[1 Red Snapper, 3 Japanese Horse Mackerel (Ahji)]
You're eating all of that by yourself?
This unni (older sister) is the unni that orders a lot of food and finishes everything by herself
[That's amazing]
These are Japanese Horse Mackerel, They call the big ones "Ahji"

They taste so much better than Mackerels in the Summer
For me at least
Bon Appetit
Ahji first
That's so good
It's really delicious
It tastes better than Tuna It even tastes better than Yellowtail
Let's do the Red Snapper now
1 bite
I love the texture
[Spectating]
It's that thief from last time!
[First meeting 2019.12.13]
[I thought you're giving us some]
[Patiently waiting]
[While she was away for a bit..]

[Long time no see]
[Who are you?]
They're ignoring me
[Time to say hello]
[Food is the best temptation]
It's expensive Different from what you normally eat, right?
[Table for 2, please]
[I heard they're serving delicious food]
[Is it over there?]
[First come first serve]
Just 1 each,
They need to start selling these in Seoul too
It's going to taste good with the perilla leaf wrap
3 pieces
I should've asked to fillet all the fish This is not enough food
It tastes so good

[While she is gone...]
[Now is the chance!]
[Today's thief]
[It's me]
[1 piece of Japanese Horse Mackerel]
[I've been robbed]
They really like the last plate (Japanese Horse Mackerel)
They're picking and choosing?
No!
It's all mine
Yummy
So tasty
This is the belly fat
It's crunchy Yum
It's oily and crunchy
Even the last bite is so delicious

Oh my Lord..
[Let me touch your belly]
You want me to cook you some Ramyun noodles?
I'll eat it at home
[Home]
I'm going to cook like 2~3 fish
[Japanese Horse Mackerel]
This is my dessert
Charcoal and wood fish grill It's going to taste amazing
Hurry and cook When will it finish?
[I'm hungry]
I'm very impatient especially when it comes to food
[Viewers: Why do you look so tired? You seem tired]
It's because I went to catch fish at the fish market
And ate about 10 servings of fish
[Viewers: Cheer up Tzuyang! We're rooting for you!]

[Yes, I got this!]
Was I supposed to grease up the grill?
Oh no, it got stuck
[Viewer: You need to smack it a couple of times]
They're telling me to smack it How do I do that?
I don't think that's it..
It's looking scrumptious
I won't need oil because it's releasing so much fish oil
Should I bring some rice?
Nah, I'll just eat the fish
It's cooking nice
It's looking really delicious
Do you want to see the color?
This is amazing Insane!
It's got to be delicious
It's so good That's amazing

[2 more]
I should've cooked 2 each time Then I would've had 4 total
Refreshing!
Bon Appetit
This is the first one I cooked
So amazing
It's the end-game of grilled fish
It even tastes better than the beltfish (hairtail)
A big piece
This calls for some rice
The sashimi was really delicious And the grill is just insane too
White rice
If I had some cooked Kimchi, It would really be game-over
Put on some Kimchi
Fish on rice,
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
